creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/fusefs-ntfs/#description> 

* the description might benefit from a general update, to mention 
  e.g. Windows 10 and so on

* WWW <https://www.tuxera.com/community/open-source-ntfs-3g/> is 
      outdated, redirects to 
      <https://www.tuxera.com/company/open-source/>.

With reference to <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/log/sysutils/fusefs-ntfs/pkg-descr> and changes of the WWW URL over time – Wayback Machine <https://web.archive.org/web/20150521042710/https://www.tuxera.com/community/open-source-ntfs-3g/> in particular, I assume that one of these two is now appropriate: 

      https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g#readme
      https://github.com/tuxera/ntfs-3g

Thank you
